# This file was generated by the YaTool build system (https://github.com/yandex/yatool),
# from a source YaTool build configuration provided in ya.make files.
#
# If the repository supports both CMake and ya build configurations, please modify both of them.
#
# If only CMake build configuration is supported then modify only CMake files and note that only
# simple modifications are allowed like adding source-files to targets or adding simple properties
# like target_include_directories. These modifications will be ported to original ya.make files
# by maintainers. Any complex modifications which can't be easily ported back to the ya build
# system may be rejected.
#
# Please refer to the build instructions in the repository for more information about manual
# changes in this file.

find_package(linux-headers-generic REQUIRED)

add_subdirectory(unittests)

add_library(library-cpp-computation)


target_compile_options(library-cpp-computation PRIVATE
  -Wdeprecated-this-capture
  -Wimplicit-fallthrough
  -Wparentheses
  -Wno-logical-op-parentheses
  -Wno-bitwise-op-parentheses
  -Wswitch
  -Wreturn-type
)

target_link_libraries(library-cpp-computation PUBLIC
  linux-headers-generic::linux-headers-generic
  contrib-libs-cxxsupp
  yutil
  cpp-containers-absl
  cpp-containers-insert_only_concurrent_cache
  library-cpp-iterator
  cpp-yt-misc
  flow-lib-serializer
  library-query-base
  library-query-engine_api
  library-cpp-common
  library-cpp-distributed_throttler
  library-cpp-resources
  library-cpp-tables
  cpp-connectors-common
  library-cpp-misc
  library-profiling-sensors_owner
)

target_sources(library-cpp-computation PRIVATE
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/computation_base.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/computation_tracer.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/controller_base.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/event_timestamp_assigner.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/external_state_manager_base.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/key_visitor.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/static_table_key_visitor_joiner.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/key_visitor_store.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/message_filter.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/meta_setter.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/passthrough_computation.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/simple_external_state_manager.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/job_state/state_providers.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/job_state/state_manager.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/stores/compact_output_store.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/stores/input_store.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/stores/timer_store.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/swift_map_computation.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/swift_ordered_source_computation.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/transform_computation.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/universal_controller_helpers.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/universal_controller.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/watermark_aligner.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/watermark_generator.cpp
)


add_global_library_for(library-cpp-computation.global
  library-cpp-computation)


target_compile_options(library-cpp-computation.global PRIVATE
  -Wdeprecated-this-capture
  -Wimplicit-fallthrough
  -Wparentheses
  -Wno-logical-op-parentheses
  -Wno-bitwise-op-parentheses
  -Wswitch
  -Wreturn-type
)

target_link_libraries(library-cpp-computation.global PUBLIC
  linux-headers-generic::linux-headers-generic
  contrib-libs-cxxsupp
  yutil
  cpp-containers-absl
  cpp-containers-insert_only_concurrent_cache
  library-cpp-iterator
  cpp-yt-misc
  flow-lib-serializer
  library-query-base
  library-query-engine_api
  library-cpp-common
  library-cpp-distributed_throttler
  library-cpp-resources
  library-cpp-tables
  cpp-connectors-common
  library-cpp-misc
  library-profiling-sensors_owner
)

target_sources(library-cpp-computation.global PRIVATE
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/computation/register.cpp
)
